message:
refactor(ftui): update main crate re-exports for new modules

Updates the main ftui crate's public API to expose new types from
the runtime and render crates.

Changes:
- Re-export DiffStrategy and related types from ftui-render
- Re-export RuntimeDiffConfig for application configuration
- Maintain backwards compatibility with existing import paths
- Update module documentation for discoverability

This allows applications to import diff strategy types directly:
  use ftui::{DiffStrategy, RuntimeDiffConfig};

Rather than reaching into sub-crates:
  use ftui_runtime::DiffStrategy;  // still works

The main crate continues to serve as the primary entry point for
FrankenTUI applications, re-exporting commonly used types from
the workspace crates.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
